Military unit

The [Israeli](/wiki/Israel "Israel") **877th "Judea and Samaria" Division** ([Hebrew](/wiki/Hebrew_language "Hebrew language"): אוּגְדָּת אֵזוֹר יְהוּדָה וְשׁוֹמְרוֹן, *Ugdat Ezor Yehuda VeShomron*; also known as the West Bank Division) is a regional [division](/wiki/Division_(military) "Division (military)")[[1]](#cite_note-auto-1) of the [Central Command](/wiki/Israeli_Central_Command "Israeli Central Command"). It is responsible for Israeli military activity in the [Judea and Samaria Area](/wiki/Judea_and_Samaria_Area "Judea and Samaria Area").

## Division organization 2025

[![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/e/e3/Israel_877th_Division_-_Organization_October_2025.png/500px-Israel_877th_Division_-_Organization_October_2025.png)](/wiki/File:Israel_877th_Division_-_Organization_October_2025.png)

877th Division "Judea and Samaria" organization as of October 2025

* [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/c/c3/Logo_ugdat_eyosh.png/40px-Logo_ugdat_eyosh.png)](/wiki/File:Logo_ugdat_eyosh.png) **877th Territorial Division "Judea and Samaria"**
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/47/421px-YoSH_h-Efraim_2.png/40px-421px-YoSH_h-Efraim_2.png)](/wiki/File:421px-YoSH_h-Efraim_2.png) **421st Territorial Brigade "Ephraim"** – [Qalqilya](/wiki/Qalqilya "Qalqilya") and [Tulkarm](/wiki/Tulkarm "Tulkarm") sectors
    - 49th Infantry Battalion "Panther"
    - 8211th Infantry Battalion
    - 8881st Infantry Battalion (Reserve)
    - 9213th Infantry Battalion (Reserve)
    - 9221st Logistic Battalion
    - Signal Company
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2c/426px-YoSH_h-Etzion.png/40px-426px-YoSH_h-Etzion.png)](/wiki/File:426px-YoSH_h-Etzion.png) **426th Territorial Brigade "Etzion"** – [Bethlehem](/wiki/Bethlehem "Bethlehem") sector
    - 21st Infantry Battalion
    - 910th Infantry Battalion
    - 8132nd Infantry Battalion
    - 8883rd Infantry Battalion (Reserve)
    - Logistic Battalion
    - Signal Company
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/7/78/431px-YoSH_h-Menashe.png/40px-431px-YoSH_h-Menashe.png)](/wiki/File:431px-YoSH_h-Menashe.png) **[431st Territorial Brigade "Menashe"](/wiki/Menashe_Territorial_Brigade "Menashe Territorial Brigade")** – [Jenin](/wiki/Jenin "Jenin") sector
    - 941st Infantry Battalion
    - 7014th Infantry Battalion
    - 9306th Infantry Battalion
    - Infantry Battalion (Reserve)
    - Logistic Battalion
    - Signal Company
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/2/2c/434px-YoSH_h-Yehuda.png/40px-434px-YoSH_h-Yehuda.png)](/wiki/File:434px-YoSH_h-Yehuda.png) **434th Territorial Brigade "Yehuda"** – [Hebron](/wiki/Hebron "Hebron") sector
    - 5060th Infantry Battalion
    - 7018th Infantry Battalion
    - 8106th Infantry Battalion
    - 7771st Infantry Battalion (Reserve)
    - Logistic Battalion
    - Signal Company
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/0/04/442px-YoSH_h-Shomron.png/40px-442px-YoSH_h-Shomron.png)](/wiki/File:442px-YoSH_h-Shomron.png) **442nd Territorial Brigade "Samaria"** – [Nablus](/wiki/Nablus "Nablus") sector
    - 967th Infantry Battalion "Hetzev"
    - 7037th Infantry Battalion "Nadav"
    - 8109th Infantry Battalion "Regev"
    - 8880th Infantry Battalion (Reserve)
    - Logistic Battalion
    - Signal Company
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/5/58/443px-YoSH_h-Beniamin.png/40px-443px-YoSH_h-Beniamin.png)](/wiki/File:443px-YoSH_h-Beniamin.png) **443rd Territorial Brigade "Benjamin"** – [Ramallah](/wiki/Ramallah "Ramallah") sector and Highway 443
    - 43rd Infantry Battalion
    - 7035th Infantry Battalion
    - 7114th Infantry Battalion
    - 8882nd Infantry Battalion (Reserve)
    - Logistic Battalion
    - Signal Company
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/3/38/Ayosh_signal.png/40px-Ayosh_signal.png)](/wiki/File:Ayosh_signal.png) Division Signal Battalion "Ofek"
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/b/b3/Nizan_temp.png/40px-Nizan_temp.png)](/wiki/File:Nizan_temp.png) 636th [Field Intelligence](/wiki/Israeli_Field_Intelligence_Corps "Israeli Field Intelligence Corps") Battalion "Nitzan"
  + [![](//upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/thumb/4/43/Logo-maavarim-erez.png/40px-Logo-maavarim-erez.png)](/wiki/File:Logo-maavarim-erez.png) Military Police Battalion "Erez"
